summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js to restore a dark/near-black color scheme. The CSS custom properties in :root are set to deep charcoal/near-black OKLCH values (matching the .dark class), ensuring the app always renders with a dark background regardless of system theme. Tailwind config adds explicit charcoal, gold, and silver color tokens. The file summaries confirm the intent aligns with REQ-16. The fix is applied globally via CSS variables rather than per-component, which can satisfy REQ-16 if all page components use the CSS variable-backed Tailwind classes.
